title: Sella (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sella''' could refer to the following:

==Canon==
*'''[[Sella]]''', a [[Twi'lek]] [[bartender]]
*'''[[Korr Sella]]''', a [[Resistance]] [[commander]]
*'''[[Sondiv Sella]]''', a [[New Republic]] official

==Legends==
*'''[[Sella Marik]]''', a reporter

{{Disambig}}
